zh.lifeSummary: 當William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby於1333年2月28日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾紐波勒德 維爾頓時，他的父親Henry de Ferrers II30歲，母親Isabel de Verdun17歲。他於1350年4月25日與Margaret de Ufford在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1371年1月8日在英國艾可斯特炳 格林享年37歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby于1333年2月28日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾紐波勒德 維爾頓时，他的父亲Henry de Ferrers II30岁，母亲Isabel de Verdun17岁。他于1350年4月25日与Margaret de Ufford在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1371年1月8日在英国艾可斯特炳 格林享年37岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby was born on 28 February 1333, in Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, England, his father, Henry de Ferrers II, was 30 and his mother, Isabel de Verdun, was 17. He married Margaret de Ufford on 25 April 1350, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 January 1371, in Stebbing Green, Essex, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Markfield, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby est né le 28 février 1333, à Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Ferrers II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Verdun, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Ufford le 25 avril 1350, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1371, à Stebbing Green, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Markfield, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby am 28. Februar 1333 in Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Ferrers II 30 und seine Mutter Isabel de Verdun 17. Er hat am 25. April 1350 in Groby, Leicestershire, England Margaret de Ufford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Januar 1371 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Stebbing Green, Essex, England und wurde in Markfield, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby è nato il il 28 febbraio 1333 nel Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Ferrers II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Verdun, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Ufford il 25 aprile 1350, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1371, nel Stebbing Green, Essex, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Markfield, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Grobyが1333年2月28日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアニューボルド バードンで生まれた時，父Henry de Ferrers IIは30歳，母Isabel de Verdunは17歳であった。1350年4月25日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでMargaret de Uffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1371年1月8日にイギリスエセックスステビング グレンで37歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマークフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby(이)가 1333년 2월 28일 영국 레이스스터실르 뉴볼드 베르든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Ferrers II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Verdun(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1350년 4월 25일 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 Margaret de Ufford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1371년 1월 8일 영국 에세스 스테브빙 그린에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 마k필드에 묻혔다.

pt.28 February 1333–8 January 1371: 28 de fevereiro de 1333–8 de janeiro de 1371
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby nasceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1333, em Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Ferrers II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Verdun, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Ufford em 25 de abril de 1350, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1371, em Stebbing Green, Essex, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Markfield, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby родился 28 февраля 1333 г. в местности нюболд вирдон, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Ferrers II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Verdun, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Ufford 25 апреля 1350 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 января 1371 г. в местности стеббинг грин, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности маркфиелд, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.28 February 1333–8 January 1371: 28 de febrero de 1333–8 de enero de 1371
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby nació el 28 de febrero de 1333, en Newbold Verdon, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Ferrers II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabel de Verdun, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Margaret de Ufford el 25 de abril de 1350, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1371, en Stebbing Green, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Markfield, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
